역대상 8:1.content: Benjamin became the father of Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, Aharah the third,

역대상 8:2.content: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

역대상 8:3.content: Bela had sons: Addar, Gera, Abihud,

역대상 8:6.content: These are the sons of Ehud. These are the heads of fathers’ households of the inhabitants of Geba, who were carried captive to Manahath:

역대상 8:7.content: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, who carried them captive; and he became the father of Uzza and Ahihud.

역대상 8:8.content: Shaharaim became the father of children in the field of Moab, after he had sent them away. Hushim and Baara were his wives.

역대상 8:9.content: By Hodesh his wife, he became the father of Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam,

역대상 8:10.content: Jeuz, Shachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers’ households.

역대상 8:11.content: By Hushim, he became the father of Abitub and Elpaal.

역대상 8:12.content: The sons of Elpaal: Eber, Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono and Lod, with its towns;

역대상 8:13.content: and Beriah, and Shema, who were heads of fathers’ households of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who put to flight the inhabitants of Gath;

역대상 8:16.content: Michael, Ishpah, Joha, the sons of Beriah,

역대상 8:18.content: Ishmerai, Izliah, Jobab, the sons of Elpaal,

역대상 8:21.content: Adaiah, Beraiah, Shimrath, the sons of Shimei,

역대상 8:25.content: Iphdeiah, Penuel, the sons of Shashak,

역대상 8:27.content: Jaareshiah, Elijah, Zichri, and the sons of Jeroham.

역대상 8:28.content: These were heads of fathers’ households throughout their generations, chief men. These lived in Jerusalem.

역대상 8:29.content: The father of Gibeon, whose wife’s name was Maacah, lived in Gibeon,

역대상 8:30.content: with his firstborn son Abdon, Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,

역대상 8:32.content: Mikloth became the father of Shimeah. They also lived with their brothers in Jerusalem, near their brothers.

역대상 8:33.content: Ner became the father of Kish. Kish became the father of Saul. Saul became the father of Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

역대상 8:34.content: The son of Jonathan was Merib Baal. Merib Baal became the father of Micah.

역대상 8:35.content: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.

역대상 8:36.content: Ahaz became the father of Jehoaddah. Jehoaddah became the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. Zimri became the father of Moza.

역대상 8:37.content: Moza became the father of Binea. Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, and Azel his son.

역대상 8:38.content: Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

역대상 8:39.content: The sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

역대상 8:40.content: The sons of Ulam were mighty men of valor, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, one hundred fifty. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.
